ops.title: Update README ship line for v0.17.0 scoped ship + bookmark guard
ops.description: README.md's command-catalog line for `ccx vcs ship` (~line 162) still shows the pre-0.17.0 surface. It should read `ccx vcs ship -m "<msg>" [paths...]` and mention that trailing paths scope the commit and that the push only auto-advances the trunk bookmark (`--bookmark <name>` overrides; exact-name anchored). Deferred from the v0.17.0 release because README.md carried a concurrent session's uncommitted hunk (tool-search alwaysLoad note) — a scoped `ship README.md` would have swept it. Land once README.md is clean in `@`: reference wording is in AGENTS.md:153 and plugin/skills/ccx/SKILL.md §7 (both shipped in e0e07fb7).

ops.text: README.md documents ship's [paths...] and --bookmark surface, and the concurrent session's alwaysLoad hunk was not swept into the commit
